name: SKAND.ENSK. 17/24 MTN
summary: SKAND.ENSK. 17/24 MTN refers to a Medium Term Note (MTN) issued by Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken (SEB) with a maturity date in 2024 and issuance year of 2017. MTNs are debt instruments that allow companies to raise capital over a specific period. SEB is a leading Nordic financial services group.
